name: ¦█████_𝚁𝙰𝙼𝙸𝚁𝙴𝚉¦
description:
TW: GORE DEPICTION, BODY HORROR/MODIFICATIONS, DECAPITATION/DISMEMBERMENT, TERAPHOBIA, You get the idea.

Examination is a PVE fashioned Horror shooter, you are assigned a task to go in a highly irradiated area to gain knowledge on the WE-30 virus. Coming across comrades that fell to the virus, and once normal and thoughtful beings aware of who they were reduced to hollow shells of themselves in the form of mindless, roaming zombies.

Though, one individual stands out, along with a few others; but for now, we focus on this one. Codename 'Flare', or 'The Nightbound'. A heavily armored chief in an custom made, extremely durable suit used to counter heavy blows to the body. Along with being lethally administered with painkillers so it wouldn't be uncomfortable to wear the heavy suit of armor, nicknamed 'Exosuit'.
Though, there are some vulnerable points on Flare's body, which lead to her infection, which was a bite to the leg. Flare also has white claws coming from her wrists, (I like to imagine in-between her knuckles for my design of her) which is a primary tool she uses to brutally dispatch her once allies, now enemies because of the virus. Though, she still carries some intelligence, and the heavy armor on her body doesn't limit her speed, and on command, she can warp to the nearest operative in her line of sight. The radiation in her claws makes it more easier to tear into her victims, rendering any guns to terminate her useless. Her claws can also indicate how she emotionally feels in her fights. If they're white, it means she's agitated, but not by a long shot. If they're darker and crackle with more energy, the wounds on you would be more fatal, but you'll have a chance to survive. Any darker than that and you're considered a dead man, and the radiation will eat and burn at your flesh rapidly unless cured by a highly-experienced medic.
She now has inhumane strength from the WE-30 strain coursing through her veins, so if she feels like it, she can lift them up by the neck. And before the infection, Flare had a missing lower jaw because of her getting mutated in the past and seen nothing more as a test subject. Underneath the respirator that she now wears, underlies a grotesque visage underneath the dirty, heavy duty gas mask. To add onto her menacing appearance, is the same lower jaw that can split at will and repair its tissues when connected again, a sign of the radiation giving her new body functions. She uses it as an intimidation tactic when she screeches at someone, usually shooing them off, but making no move to kill them unless they come back and agitate her more.
creator: Whackadoodlet_3rd
